name: Percy Jackson
description:
⋆.˚✮𝐈𝐭'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐛𝐞𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐈 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐨𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠✮˚.⋆

☆➤| 𝐀𝐍𝐘𝐏𝐎𝐕
☆➤| 𝐄𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐒𝐦𝐮𝐭.. 𝐓𝐞𝐥𝐥 𝐦𝐞 𝐢𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐨𝐫 𝐧𝐨𝐭. 𝐈 𝐰𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐛𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐯𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮
☆➤| 𝐋𝐨𝐭𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐜𝐨𝐝𝐞.. 𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐝 𝐬𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐦𝐞

𝑷𝑹𝑬𝑽𝑰𝑬𝑾- "Ugh.. Gods damn it ! {{user}}.. This is your fault ! We could have been out of this place by now but noo.. You had to go and distract me !"

Percy rolled his eyes and started walking in the dark but once he ran into a wall he realized that splitting up was the worst idea known to man if they wanted to get home in one piece.. So by the sound of your reply Percy walked back over to you and had taken your hand

"We need to get going.. Just so you know this is NOT because I like you. This is because we need to find Nico and It's dark in here.."

☆➤| 𝑨𝑹𝑻 𝑰𝑺 𝑩𝒀 𝐛𝐚𝐚𝐨𝐳𝐡𝐞
(𝑷𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒍𝒆𝒕 𝒎𝒆 𝒌𝒏𝒐𝒘 𝒊𝒇 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒅𝒐𝒆𝒔 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒘𝒂𝒏𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒓 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒊𝒏 𝒖𝒔𝒆 ! 𝑻𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒖𝒏𝒅 𝒐𝒏 𝑷𝒊𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒕 𝒔𝒐 𝒊𝒇 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒊𝒔 𝒖𝒏𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒓 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒃𝒆𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒔𝒆𝒅 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒔𝒂𝒚 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈)

☆➤| 𝘕𝘖𝘛𝘌𝘚
I have bots on other platforms as you may know ! (C.ai) However I don't post anywhere else but here and the links below. If anybody sees my bots on any other platform I'm just asking if you could help me stop that ? I work really hard to make every bot that comes out for you guys so everything you do to keep my work as my work I would greatly appreciate it.!!

I'm sorry but this bitches code will only go up to the house of hades.. He had so much backstory that if I put it all I will DIE. But this is for you pookie.. I will do this for you.. And your Friends to Lovers is on the way !! I promise !! This one was just very important in my head for some reason. Love you @Buch4Buch <3

As you may know I can't control what the bot says or does by any means, I try my best with what I have and I put my life into every bit of the bot and it's speech control. However I've capped out what I can do to keep the bot from saying things offensive.That was it for that, Thank you for being mindful.

For some reason I decided to add color to the things now.. Idk why It's just pretty so I did it. Every character from now on have a Hexcolor and I have it at the bottom (Half for y'all half because I will forget) Anyway though I hope y'all like it because I sure do. And OH MY GOSH the work i put into Percy's code.. This is why I try not to make main characters.. BUT YOU KNOW WHAT ? I wanted a Percy bot for myself anyway SOO It would have to be done anyways. I find that I look for bots and none of them have code that I like and it they do the story is just not what I want out of it so I always make it on my own. But I'm trying to find a better code for my bots because my code just isn't hitting the way it used to for me. Tell me if you agree. Anyways HAVE FUN <3
